biological_replicate: collected directly from the rectum of four healthy, weaned pigs
experimental_design: in vitro study with β-mannan vs control
In the present in vitro study, the microbial community underwent changes in the presence of β-mannan
factor_value: β-mannan as a substrate to stimulate the secretion of EVs
number_of_fractions: Twelve 1 mL fractions were collected from the top.
